---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for GlowGuide
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem to Solve

A clear description of the problem this feature addresses.  
Example: "I want to find routines for mental wellness but there is no such care category."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope

Which part of the app would this affect?

- [ ] Home page
- [ ] Product Library
- [ ] Routine Builder
- [ ] Contribute / Contribution workflow
- [ ] Multilingual support
- [ ] New care category (specify below)
- [ ] CI/CD or developer tooling
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or references to help illustrate the request.
